hub.description: Hub core — routes inbound messages, dispatches to voice/LLM/image workers. _INBOX.> required for NatsLlmDriver.stream() manual inbox subscription (tighten in #715).

telegram-adapter.description: Telegram bot adapter — _INBOX.> required for readiness probe via nc.request() on lyra.system.ready; allow_responses covers replier side only, not requester inbox. Tighten to per-identity inbox prefix tracked in #717.

discord-adapter.description: Discord bot adapter — same readiness-probe _INBOX.> requirement as telegram-adapter.

tts-adapter.description: Lyra-side TTS voice satellite (retired in #690 cutover). Readiness probe via nc.request('lyra.system.ready') needs _INBOX.>/_inbox.> — both forms included because nats-py historically emits lowercase inboxes and NATS subjects are case-sensitive.

stt-adapter.description: Lyra-side STT voice satellite (retired in #690 cutover). Same readiness-probe _INBOX.>/_inbox.> requirement as tts-adapter.

voice-tts.description: voicecli nats-serve TTS worker on Machine 1 (#689). AdapterBase subscribes to heartbeat_subject (no-op callback) in addition to publishing — ACL must allow both pub and sub on heartbeat.

voice-stt.description: voicecli nats-serve STT worker on Machine 1 (#689). Same heartbeat pub+sub pattern as voice-tts.

llm-worker.description: Reserved LLM worker identity — publishes health status, subscribes to LLM request queue.

image-worker.description: imagecli nats-serve satellite (ADR-050, imageCLI#50 + #754). _INBOX.>/_inbox.> defensively included for reply-path robustness, mirroring voice-tts/voice-stt — allow_responses alone may not cover every nats-server version's reply publish path.

monitor.description: Monitoring identity — full pub+sub on lyra.monitor.> namespace.
